ShortDescription.Value: Show/Hide notification alert icons, add/remove Money, view Money, set Milestones.

Publish.LongDescription:
- City Watchdog helps reduce city alert icon clutter; includes handy city setup tools. - It's modeled on the original City Controller mod. - Many new features and future plans.
### Features
- Show or hide notification alert icons. - Start with a custom Milestone. Trains now! Yes you can!. - Open the notification panel from the top-left button or hotkey.
#### Money tools - Manual: add/subtract money on the fly with hotkeys ([ or ]). - Optional automatic money refiller. Manual is still recommended. - Money view for toolbar values. - Convert saves from Unlimited money type to normal Limited money.
Hotkeys - Shift+N = open/close panel (same as clicking on Top Left icon). - N = toggle all notification icons on/off (same as clicking on Toggle All * star button) - [ = Add Money - ] = Subtract Money - Hold the money hotkey to repeat instead of clicking many times.
### Important Notes - Check **Show Instructions** on the About tab. - City Watchdog hides/shows alert icons; it does not fix the problem. Great for for reducing visual stress or just to have a cleaner UI. - Make a backup before converting an Unlimited Money save. Mod cannot undo that conversion. - This is a heavily rewritten redux/expansion of City Controller. It is nearly a whole rewrite. - CWD's Money View is a redesigned ground-up code write of similar money info to Show Text Trends (retired). MV uses different methods to do vanilla CS2 extensions, 3 customizable money layouts, settings options, and translations. - Install Achievement Fixer mod if you want Achievements while using mods, it was removed from this mod.
I hope you enjoy the new features, better performance, and safety checks!
### Support and feedback Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord links on the right.
If you like free mods, give a Like :)
### Future - 10 languages supported now, more in the future! - If anyone can make better thumbnail or screenshots, please let me know.
### Credits - River Mochi - author/maintainer - Thanks to Mbyron26 for orig. City Controller mod (retired). - Money View inspired by earlier mods by DanielNZ Show Text. - Dorkington - tester/feature suggestion - Flightech, SonNathan - testers - Thumbnail photograph by Maryia Shedava at Mont Saint-Michel in Normandy, France: https://unsplash.com/photos/a-dog-poses-in-front-of-a-distant-castle-bEpjaU_CTcM
Publish.ChangeLog: - added: Italian translation. - added: Add/subtract money hotkeys, can now be held down to repeat. - added: Population tooltip now shows births, deaths, moved in, and moved out. - added: font-size sliders 90% - 130% for population + money tooltips. Fills request by player with visibility challenges. - improved: international money numbers using vanilla CS2 formatting. - improved: Money View tooltip layouts for - Mini, Compact, and Full Data. - updated: images, instructions - internal: simplified, cleaned, organized code.
